reason: Full `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun run test:e2e` fails with 34 unrelated specs outside the artifact-types scope on this base worktree, so AC 3 cannot be satisfied in this bead even though the new artifact-type coverage passes.

done:
- Added stable selectors to `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/ArtifactTypePanel.svelte` for the collision selector and tab/panel content.
- Added fixture-backed Playwright coverage for single-match, collision-selector, and truncation snapshot cases in `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/artifacts.spec.ts`.
- Captured `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/artifacts.spec.ts-snapshots/artifact-type-template-truncated-linux.png`.
- Confirmed `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bun run test:e2e -- e2e/artifacts.spec.ts --grep "artifact type panel"` passes.

follow_up:
- Repair the unrelated failing e2e specs in `e2e/a11y.spec.ts`, `e2e/app.spec.ts`, `e2e/operator-prompts.spec.ts`, `e2e/scale-fixture.spec.ts`, `e2e/screenshots.spec.ts`, `e2e/sessions.spec.ts`, `e2e/efficacy.spec.ts`, and `src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/drain.e2e.ts`, then rerun the full gate.
